key_findings: MK broad consuming 47.9% of spend at 48.8% ACoS — confirmed cannibalization with SK campaigns
SK TOS at 199% driving expensive singular term clicks (58.7% ACoS vs 18.0% plural)
PT campaign budget-starved at 99.66% utilization with best ACoS (31.8%)
MK exact TOS efficient (32.3%) but 'Other on-Amazon' at 81.5% ACoS — no modifier available for Other
900% TOS on Auto TOS campaign — dormant, $0.30/30d spend
4 of 8 campaigns with zero negative keywords
3 dead 'low bid' discovery campaigns ($0.08-$0.30 total spend)
Negative net profit per Seller Board (-$24.96 to -$14.05/day) — ACoS improvement is existential
Hero keywords (#1 organic rank) don't need TOS defense — spending efficiency matters more
Only 1 SK campaign for 4+ high-SV keywords (need 3-4 more SK campaigns)

actions.description: Lower MK broad TOS 114% → 67% — 47.9% of portfolio spend at 45.9% ACoS on TOS placement
actions.campaign_name: embroidery beginner - SPM MK broad TOS
actions.data_confidence: HIGH — 30d placement data: TOS 88.6% of spend at 45.8% ACoS, 295 search terms analyzed

actions.description: Lower SK 'embroidery kit for beginners' TOS 199% → 118% — singular term at 58.7% ACoS vs plural at 18.0%
actions.campaign_name: embroidery beginners - SPM SK embroidery kit for beginners TOS
actions.data_confidence: HIGH — 30d placement data: TOS 96.7% of spend at 46.7% ACoS, singular/plural CVR split confirmed

actions.description: Increase PT budget $7/d → $12/d — budget-starved at 99.66% utilization with 31.8% ACoS (best performer)
actions.estimated_weekly_impact: +$35/wk spend at ~31.8% ACoS = +$110/wk sales, +$75/wk profit contribution
actions.data_confidence: HIGH — 30d data: ASIN target b087dyhmz2 at 20.9% ACoS, TOS placement at 33.0% ACoS

actions.description: Lower MK exact TOS 158% → 107% — TOS efficient (32.3%) but 'Other on-Amazon' at 81.5% ACoS, moderate reduction to lower default bid exposure
actions.data_confidence: MEDIUM — Placement data showed TOS was efficient, real waste is 'Other on-Amazon' (no direct modifier). Presented Options A/B/C to user. Moderate reduction is a compromise approach.
actions.note: Original recommendation revised after placement data revealed TOS was efficient (32.3% ACoS) while 'Other on-Amazon' was the waste source (81.5% ACoS). 'Other' has no bid modifier — only lever is lowering TOS % which reduces the TOS/default bid gap.

actions.description: Negate 'embroidery kit for kids' EXACT in MK broad — stop cannibalization with SK campaign

Create SK 'kids embroidery kit' EXACT (SV 5,802, proven 10 orders in MK broad)
Create SK 'embroidery for kids' EXACT (SV 4,159, proven 4 orders at 16.6-41.2% ACoS)
Lower MK broad budget $20/d → $14/d (after new SK campaigns created)
Lower 900% TOS on Auto TOS campaign (390180579716853) to 100%
Pause 2 dead low-bid campaigns: PT low bid (534466935351230), MK research (380377457874946)
Monitor B08DJYBH4D organic sales — all PPC paused, Seller Board shows organic revenue
